description: Create a septic system drainfield plan in LibreCAD using inches as the unit. The plan must include four layers: 'DBOX' (Cyan), 'TRENCHES' (Green), 'PIPES' (Red), and 'LABELS' (Yellow). Draw a 24"x24" Distribution Box centered at (-48, 0) on the 'DBOX' layer. On the 'TRENCHES' layer, draw three parallel 36" wide by 600" long Absorption Trenches with their left edges aligned at X=48; position the middle trench centered at Y=0 and the top and bottom trenches centered at Y=108 and Y=-108. Draw three connecting pipe lines on the 'PIPES' layer from the D-Box outlet at (-36, 0) to the center-left of each trench at (48, 108), (48, 0), and (48, -108). Add text labels 'D-BOX', 'TRENCH 1', 'TRENCH 2', and 'TRENCH 3' on the 'LABELS' layer. Save the completed drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/septic_plan.dxf.
